repo.description: FILM: Frame Interpolation for Large Motion, In ECCV 2022.

terms.context_snippet: The official Tensorflow 2 implementation of our high quality frame interpolation neural network. We present a unified single-network approach that doesn't use additional pre-trained networks, like optical flow or depth, and yet achieve state-of-the-art results. We use a multi-sc…
